name: Savannah Crispy Wafers
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Chilled butter, cut into cubes
2 tablespoons Sugar or grated Parmesan cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking soda and salt in a food processor. Add the butter cubes and process while continuing to add yogurt. Remove the dough and wrap it tightly in wax paper or plastic wrap. Chill thoroughly.
2. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
3. Lightly flour a clean surface. Break off pieces of the dough and roll each piece into rounds about 1 inch thick. Roll each round until paper-thin. Sprinkle with sugar or Parmesan cheese. Transfer rounds to a baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes.
4. Turn off the heat and let stand until wafers are crisp and lightly browned. Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
Yield: 10-12 wafers.
From: Craig Claiborne's Southern Cooking
